title: Resolution Requesting the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Instruct the Sanitation Officer to Conduct Sanitary Inspection to All Funeral Parlors and Similar Establishments in the Municipality to Confirm Compliance with the Provisions Set by the Septage Ordinance, Sanitation Code and Other Existing Laws and Regulations. Councilor Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mpa, Ree, Rmp 02/06/2023
